entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Cereal crop (Sorghum bicolor) cultivated in India during kharif and rabi seasons

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Geographic location where sorghum is cultivated

entities.name: KHARIF SEASON
entities.description: Rainy season during which sorghum is cultivated

entities.name: RABI SEASON
entities.description: Post-rainy season during which sorghum is cultivated

entities.name: GRAIN QUALITY
entities.description: A trait of rabi sorghum that influences its market price and food use

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Cereal crop (Triticum aestivum) used as a market price comparison for high-quality rabi sorghum

entities.name: NARROW GENETIC BASE
entities.description: A genetic constraint affecting the improvement of rabi sorghum

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A productivity trait of rabi sorghum showing low variability

entities.name: RABI SEASON ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to adapt to the post-rainy season

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Local varieties of rabi sorghum that serve as repositories of genetic variability

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity of genetic traits found within rabi sorghum landraces

entities.name: LOCAL ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The trait of landraces that allows them to thrive in specific local environments

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Methodological efforts to improve crop quality using genetic resources from landraces
